case_title: KARL NICHOLAS VS. BLOOD CENTERS OF THE PACIFIC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-19-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-19-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY LISA BOLCH--DIRECTOR OF COMMUNICATIONS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NICHOLAS, KARL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BLOOD CENTERS OF THE PACIFIC STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
